headline: VTSAX vs VOO ETF: Which Vanguard Fund Should You Buy in 2026?
summary: For investors seeking low-cost U.S. stock market exposure, two Vanguard funds dominate the conversation: the Vanguard Total Stock Market Index Fund Admiral Shares (VTSAX) and the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF (VOO). At first glance, choosing between a mutual fund and an ETF can feel confusing. Both give you broad exposure to the U.S. market, but they work differently when it comes to how you buy, trade, and manage them. Here, we compare both to help investors decide which option may be the better fit for
